description: In Go, validate the json.Unmarshal targets, channel close semantics, and io.Reader handling where external data crosses in.
body: In Go, defects cluster at json.Unmarshal targets, channel close semantics, and io.Reader handling, where assumptions about types, ownership, or encoding stop holding. Use when a change crosses exported identifiers, interface satisfaction, and struct tag contracts or consumes data from outside the program. Do not assume the other side honors your contract, and avoid trusting input without checking it. Actions: identify the boundary, test both valid and malformed input, verify the error path, and record the assumptions you are relying on. Validation signals include tests for the failure path, a trace of rejected input, and a documented contract at exported identifiers, interface satisfaction, and struct tag contracts. Risk boundary: escalate when the boundary handles untrusted input, crosses a trust/security line, or feeds a system you cannot roll back.
